question: 포레스트 검프는 어떤 장르에 속하나요?
answer: 포레스트 검프는 코미디, 드라마, 로맨스, 전쟁 장르에 속합니다.
contexts:
["Executed Cypher query: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.title CONTAINS 'Forrest Gump' MATCH (m)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN DISTINCT m.title AS movie, g.name AS genre ORDER BY m.title, g.name
<Record movie='Forrest Gump' genre='Comedy'>
<Record movie='Forrest Gump' genre='Drama'>
<Record movie='Forrest Gump' genre='Romance'>
<Record movie='Forrest Gump' genre='War'>"]

cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.title CONTAINS 'Forrest Gump' MATCH (m)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN DISTINCT m.title AS movie, g.name AS genre ORDER BY m.title, g.name

question: 매트릭스와 매트릭스 리로디드에 모두 출연한 배우는 누구인가요?
answer: 매트릭스와 매트릭스 리로디드에 모두 출연한 배우는 Carrie-Anne Moss와 Keanu Reeves입니다.
contexts:
["Executed Cypher query: cypher
MATCH (m1:Movie) WHERE m1.title CONTAINS 'Matrix' AND NOT m1.title CONTAINS 'Reloaded' 
MATCH (m2:Movie) WHERE m2.title CONTAINS 'Matrix Reloaded' 
MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m1), (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2) 
RETURN DISTINCT p.name AS actor ORDER BY p.name

<Record actor='Carrie-Anne Moss'>
<Record actor='Keanu Reeves'>"]
ground_truth: 매트릭스와 매트릭스 리로디드에 모두 출연한 배우는 다음과 같습니다: Carrie-Anne Moss, Keanu Reeves
cypher:
cypher
MATCH (m1:Movie) WHERE m1.title CONTAINS 'Matrix' AND NOT m1.title CONTAINS 'Reloaded' 
MATCH (m2:Movie) WHERE m2.title CONTAINS 'Matrix Reloaded' 
MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m1), (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2) 
RETURN DISTINCT p.name AS actor ORDER BY p.name

question: 가장 많은 영화를 감독한 감독은 누구인가요?
contexts:
["Executed Cypher query: cypher
MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) 
RETURN d.name AS director, count(DISTINCT m) AS movie_count 
ORDER BY movie_count DESC 
LIMIT 1

<Record director='Woody Allen' movie_count=42>"]
ground_truth: 가장 많은 영화를 감독한 감독은 Woody Allen - 42입니다.
cypher:
cypher
MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) 
RETURN d.name AS director, count(DISTINCT m) AS movie_count 
ORDER BY movie_count DESC 
LIMIT 1
